---
title: "Rhapsody in `R`"
format: revealjs
auto-stretch: false
editor: 
  mode: source
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(gm)
```

## Renfei Mao's `gm` package

::::: {.columns .v-center-container}
::: {.column width="50%"}

![](images/gm.png)

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

:::
:::::

## Ravel: Prélude in A Minor, M. 65 {.scrollable}

![](images/prelude/prelude-0-full.png)

## Add meter and tempo

```{r}
prelude <- Music() + 
  Meter(3, 4) + 
  Tempo(60)
```
